headline: Autodesk BioDapt Alliance Highlights New AI Uses And Investor Questions
summary: Autodesk and high performance prosthetics maker BioDapt have entered a partnership to apply Autodesk's Fusion AI powered design tools to para athlete prosthetics. The collaboration focuses on making customized, high performance assistive products more accessible to para athletes and wider patient groups. The partnership highlights a new use case for Autodesk's cloud connected manufacturing solutions beyond its traditional design and engineering markets. For investors watching Autodesk,...
